đź’•Imported original leatherđź’•Complete original packagingđź’•This brand classic GG Marmont series handbag is crafted from extremely soft nappa leather, adorned with double G hardware and paired with a three-dimensional, multi-faceted chain shoulder strap, making the entire bag structure soft and exquisite.
Apricot pink quilted V-shaped nappa leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Taupe viscose lining
Double G
Interior: One slip pocket
Sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm high)
Spring buckle flap
Model: 837280
Dimensions: 22cm (W) x 12.5cm (H) x 6cm (D)
Weight: Approx. 0.55kg
Color: Apricot pink/Original leather
Made in Italy
